## items (34 lines)

pub mod zenpicker
#[non_exhaustive] #[repr(u8)] pub enum CodecFamily
pub CodecFamily::Avif = 3
pub CodecFamily::Gif = 5
pub CodecFamily::Jpeg = 0
pub CodecFamily::Jxl = 2
pub CodecFamily::Png = 4
pub CodecFamily::Webp = 1
pub const CodecFamily::ALL: [CodecFamily; 6]
pub const CodecFamily::COUNT: usize
pub const fn CodecFamily::index(self) -> usize
pub const fn CodecFamily::label(self) -> &'static str
#[non_exhaustive] pub enum MetaPickerError
pub MetaPickerError::FamilyOrderMismatch
pub MetaPickerError::FamilyOrderMismatch::actual: alloc::string::String
pub MetaPickerError::FamilyOrderMismatch::expected: alloc::string::String
pub MetaPickerError::Metadata(alloc::string::String)
pub MetaPickerError::Predict(zenpredict::error::PredictError)
pub struct AllowedFamilies
pub const fn AllowedFamilies::all() -> Self
pub fn AllowedFamilies::allow(self, CodecFamily) -> Self
pub fn AllowedFamilies::any(self) -> bool
pub const fn AllowedFamilies::as_slice(&self) -> &[bool]
pub fn AllowedFamilies::deny(self, CodecFamily) -> Self
pub fn AllowedFamilies::from_allowed<I: core::iter::traits::collect::IntoIterator<Item = CodecFamily>>(I) -> Self
pub fn AllowedFamilies::is_allowed(self, CodecFamily) -> bool
pub const fn AllowedFamilies::none() -> Self
pub struct MetaPicker<'b>
pub fn MetaPicker<'b>::new(&'b zenpredict::model::Model) -> Self
pub fn MetaPicker<'b>::pick(&mut self, &[f32], &AllowedFamilies) -> core::result::Result<core::option::Option<CodecFamily>, MetaPickerError>
pub fn MetaPicker<'b>::predictor(&mut self) -> &mut zenpredict::predictor::Predictor<'b>
pub fn MetaPicker<'b>::validate_family_order(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<(), MetaPickerError>
pub const ALL_LABELS_CSV: &str
pub const FAMILY_ORDER_KEY: &str
